acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-UnifiedBus SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for sig-UnifiedBus is responsible for the evolution and maintenance of the UB OS component in the community.. The SIG has 46 core members and maintains 19 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-UnifiedBus SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-UnifiedBus SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at sig-UnifiedBus@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-UnifiedBus SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-UnifiedBus SIG maintains 19 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-UnifiedBus.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-UnifiedBus SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-UnifiedBus SIG has 5 Maintainers, including: Hanjun Guo, Liang Li, LiJun Li. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
